name: Dashboard displays XP and coin counters for a logged-in user
description: Verify the dashboard shows the XP and coins stat labels with numeric values, confirming the gamification system renders correctly. Do not assert on any specific numeric value — the test account's XP and coins change over time.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading

Verify the dashboard displays an 'XP' label next to a numeric value (any number, including 0) and a 'Coins' label next to a numeric value (any number, including 0). Both label-and-value pairs must be visible on the page. Do not assert on a specific number — just that a number is present next to each label.
